gigapan.description:
The full Chime Generator model at the Long Now Museum, 2/17/2011.

Compare it with this detail of the chime generator from 2008
http://gigapan.org/gigapans/2786/

Or this 360 of the full room:
http://gigapan.org/gigapans/2795/

Back then there were brass tubes as a stand in for the real bells which are now part of the Chime Generator
